sections.paragraph: adj f., Jer 46:20, fairish; from masc. יְפֵהְפִי (of the form קְטַלְטָל, Lehrg. 497), the letter ה quiescing in the middle of the word (Lehrg. p. 48). In consequence of this word appearing to be too discrepant from ordinary usage, in very many MSS. and editions it is found divided into two.
